title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 18: Liberation Through Renunciation
description: Chapter 18 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna's final teaching: surrender all actions to me. Abandon all dharmas. I shall liberate you from all sins.
introduction: Chapter 18 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna's final teaching: surrender all actions to me. Abandon all dharmas. I shall liberate you from all sins.

translation.text: Abandon all dharmas and take refuge in me alone. I shall liberate you from all sins. Do not grieve.
